name: Quiz & Learn: Food & Drink
short_description: A relaxing multiple-choice quiz about food and drink that includes photo rounds with interesting facts
detailed_description:
Have you ever wondered which foods are radioactive? Why food is rarely the colour blue? Who invented beer? Or why we don’t eat turkey eggs? Learn all of this and much more in Quiz & Learn: Food & Drink. Test your knowledge to unlock photo rounds that contain amazing facts. You will definitely learn something you never knew!

Features

Over 200 multiple choice questions of varying difficulty

No time limit to answer

Easy controls

6 rounds that test your knowledge

6 rounds with amazing facts about food and drink illustrated with photographs

Relaxing soundtrack with 7 different tracks

24 Steam achievements
